full_text:
The sample consisted of two small but hard pieces, all tissue was minced into small pieces and dissociated with: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before, in the middle, and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. After RBC lysis and centrifugation, the final pellet was resuspended in 1 ml of media and counted.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

2 vials of 0.9 E6 cells each were frozen. The cells were resuspended in 2 mL of STEMCELL Banker and divided into 1 ml per tube.
